channel.title: Comments on: Le Corbussier et Papin

item.title: By: Ronaldo
item.dc:creator: Ronaldo
item.description: Ronaldo remembers his first wild poo in the old country. As I stood up I realised I had no hygienic paper to patter my cracker, but on the floor the turds had taken the shape of CR7. It was destiny.
item.content:encoded: Ronaldo remembers his first wild poo in the old country. As I stood up I realised I had no hygienic paper to patter my cracker, but on the floor the turds had taken the shape of CR7. It was destiny.
